metadata.purpose: Proposition -> evidence join table. The existing infrastructure is evidence-side (literature/, derivation.qmd, verification/cache); this file records, per manuscript proposition, WHICH evidence backs it, making the gate checkable per-proposition. Populated during the Level-3 decomposition and maintained during every section review.

evidence_classes.lit: literature/<citekey>.md - read-in-session rule applies before status may reach 'verified'
evidence_classes.verif: committed artifact under verification/ (cache RDS/CSV, scripts, run logs)
evidence_classes.xmodel: cross-model audit record (GPT-5.5 runs, blind re-derivation gradings)

metadata.status_ladder: proposed -> queued -> acquired -> verified -> cited (lit class; mirrors todo/003). deriv/verif/xmodel entries are 'verified' once the pointer resolves and the content was checked against the claim.

schema_example.passage_or_value: Optional: the specific passage, equation, or cached number relied on.
schema_example.note: What this entry establishes for the proposition, and any caveat.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Abstract: ML and Bayesian MI 'currently represent the state of the art.'
20th-anniversary update framing; catalogs settled landscape (mechanisms, FIML, Bayes, MI, MNAR, multilevel).
The MI program: impute m times, analyze, combine.
SS5 :404: 'the connected AIC method seems worthwhile to be further investigated, both theoretically as well as in practical situations. This, however, extends the scope of the current paper.'
evidence_map.note: Prior MI-AIC's own open-theory statement; quote used in P2.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: SS1 :54 'surprisingly sparse'; SS2.1 :123 averaged criteria 'not supported by MI literature' (citing White et al. 2011 p.389).
Abstract :24: 'there are currently no guidelines for variable selection in multiply imputed data sets.'
Ch.5: D1/D2/D3 testing + Wald-based stepwise + LASSO variants; no IC-after-MI treatment.
MI-inference section covers Wald/LRT pooling + SEM fit only.
M1 typing pass section (2026-06-06): centering question + replication principle confirmed unposed across the theory line.
evidence_map.note: Backs the asserted-here typing of the principle.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: SS4 :279: 'A good method should have type 1 error close to that observed using the full data.'
evidence_map.note: The precedented benchmark practice the novelty claim is scoped against.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Table 7: AIC_orig 0.731/0.722 vs MI methods 0.540-0.594.
evidence_map.note: Displays the replication gap without framing it - second precedent for the benchmark practice.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: +1/2 tr(RIV) + (A)+(C) and the +tr/-1/2tr decomposition.
(A)+(C): O(1), MCAR vanishing.
Model-specific bias; corrected criterion; noncentral shrinkage factors.
Null-side rungs 2-3: 0.904/0.903 vs oracle 0.899 (exact values quoted in S4, qualitative here).
Calibrated reference absorbs the null mean (eq. 1.10 spectrum).
evidence_map.note: Testing side of the null-replication claim.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: :77-89: AIC_{x;y} penalty d + tr(I_x I_y^{-1}); 'The additional penalty is only half the value of that in PDIO'; SS8 names mechanism combinations as future work.
AICcd = -2Q + 2tr(I_x I_y^{-1}); complete-data discrepancy motivation.
TIC-style criterion on the EM Q-function for missing covariates ('best approximating' values; no correct-specification assumption).
Weighted (Horvitz-Thompson) AIC for incomplete/design-based samples.
evidence_map.note: Reweighting route; leaves imputation-based criterion open.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Covariate-shift weighting of the log-likelihood.
Congeniality definition and the uncongenial controversy.
MAR definition :61; distinctness :65; sampling-vs-likelihood SS9.
Score identity + information decomposition (:59-:86).
'missing information principle' :211; DM rate matrix :137.
evidence_map.note: The I_obs = I_com - I_mis form + the rate-matrix contrast.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: 'since we do not know...' :259; Q definition.
evidence_map.note: Q-function restatement; Q = L + H; curvature I_com.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Remark 2 :74: 'Rubin (1987) referred to the quantities z(1),...,z(m) as multiple imputations.'
Result 3.2 :2438; r_inf (3.1.7) :2534; 'usual approximation' :2538.
Laplace-type posterior approximation.
Congeniality formalization (abstract + SS1).
'downward bias... simply realized by adding k' :148.
chi-square_{h-m} conclusion :96.
Naive vs unconditional information :128-:140; observed-info recommendation :111.
Combining rule (SS2-3).
Maximize-then-average statistic; defect repairs.
Eigenvalue estimation; weighted-sum null law (eq 1.10).
SS5: aic_D; open-theory closing statement :404.
evidence_map.note: The prior MI-AIC whose question S4c answers.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Ch.4: SS4.2 randomization-validity conditions; SS4.3 proper/improper examples incl. Example 4.2 (fully normal Bayesian); SS4.4 further discussion.
:177 'Bayesian multiple imputations are proper, when the complete data estimator is the complete data MLE'; :265 properness analysis-relative; :335 congeniality implies properness (m=inf).
evidence_map.note: Properness scoping; the MLE-analyst case this paper occupies.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Known-scale arms: 0 (deterministic/improper) vs -1/2 tr(RIV) (proper MI); difference = posterior-draw contribution C_n.
evidence_map.note: Why the distinction does work in the theorem.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Dated decisions D-01..D-12, T-01..T-07, each with rejected options.
evidence_map.note: The decision log the paragraph describes.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Five-pattern heuristic with frequencies (599 turns, 13 codes) and a 25-episode verified table; episodes E11 and E14 are the two cited in P2.
evidence_map.note: todo/032 qualitative coding of the 34-transcript session record; primary data committed under verification/cache/collab-analysis/.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Hook specification: PreToolUse check blocking unbacked citation tokens on manuscript/ and plan JSONs (implementation at .claude/hooks/check_citations.py, tested by scripts/test_check_citations_hook.py).
Source-passage apparatus in the companion derivation.
Dual-CAS + MC verification apparatus (executable Appendix B).

evidence_map.passage_or_value: W1/W2/W3 preregistration frozen at SHA ddc9037; dated amendments.
IC-ladder preregistration with frozen pass criteria C1-C6.
Comprehensive-sweep preregistration H1-H6.
Cross-model gate record (blind Mode A + adversarial Mode B, sustained).

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Fitted-vs-oracle callout: both conditionings, both signs; the 8/9 blind episode.
evidence_map.note: The sign-episode resolution in the companion.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Single entry point, seeds, phase caches.
Seeded (20260604+r), core-count-invariant; sessioninfo recorded.
Theorem statement + Term B variance-of-gap argument.
(A)+(C) structure, sign, closed form, three-tier standing.
Prop L1, I_com metric, three routes.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Overstatement inequality + exact Schur gap.
Pseudo-true values; nested/non-nested/overlapping; weighted chi-square law (abstract).
Eq 1.10 weighted-sum null law; spectrum mean exceeds q_d by tr(RIV_perp).
Corrected criterion; model-specific bias; ranking consequence.
AIC_{x;y} penalty identity; half the PDIO/AICcd surcharge.
The three maps from the analytic null weights.
3.6e-15 equality-case agreement; difference 6.10 vs 10.00.
Power arms + size-adjusted analysis.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: SS8: mechanism combinations named as future work.
The committed collaboration analysis; transcripts public per D-13.

evidence_map.passage_or_value: Sec.1-2: EMB algorithm (EM on bootstrap resamples; draws at bootstrapped parameters); MVN assumption.
W1 design constants (trRIV~5.55; non-monotone MAR; N grid; R=1000) + target band.
Known-scale design (N=200, R=2e5, location-only, known Sigma); targets 0 and -1/2 tr(RIV).
LRT design (N=200, M=200, R=1000, 8-point delta grid, four references).
Discrimination design (heavy X1 MAR; N in {500,1000}; R=2000); 2.64 vs 8.5 targets.
Pairing design (sigma12=0 cell; three arms; N in {500,1000,2000}; R=2000).
60-cell selection sweep design constants.
Ladder design (3 cells; N=500; R=2000; q_d=4; five constructions).
Non-nested design (AR(1) truth; similar + dissimilar pairs; R=20000; MCAR twin).
Dissimilar-pair design (diagonal vs AR(1)).
Pooled 2.43+/-0.26; target 2.77 / 2.42-2.55; N=1000 2.6 se miss; components 9-20%.
E[T] vs target band across N; pooled estimate; N=1000 miss flagged.
Two arms vs targets {0, -0.561}.
Type I error 0.042 / 0.034 vs nominal 0.05; ~5% naive-input note.
Type I error of four references vs nominal 0.05; raw power dropped (confounded).
Observed differential vs projected-trace line and naive line.
single grows, paired-null flat, paired-fixed grows.
0.90 / 0.67 / 0.82 at N=500; 100% saturated misclassifications.
oracle/uncorrected/corrected bars across N with oracle reference.
3x5 selection table; two-moment/equating reach oracle at rho=0.40; floor at rho=0.10.
grouped bars per cell with oracle reference line.
null KS bars + noncentral measured-vs-predicted y=x.
levels +2.6/+2.9 (MAR) collapsing (MCAR); similar below resolution; ~9%.
dissimilar isolated differential -1.2 at 3.5 se.
level collapse + isolated differential CIs (similar below resolution, dissimilar resolved).
verification/figures.R draws all 9 PNG exhibits from the committed caches; deterministic.
tr_samp vs tr_obs: |sample RIV - observed-data RIV|/tr_obs ~ 2.1-2.6% (N200 2.6%, N500 2.1%), no widening with N.
FIML vs EMB-congenial selection agreement within 0.011 on the recovery gap.
uncongenial cells: uncorrected ~0.93 > complete-data benchmark ~0.91; corrected ~0.98 (benchmark-minus-corrected negative).
evidence_map.note: Congeniality limit (tribunal 2026-06-26; fulfills todo/005 H5 section-6 commitment).

acquisition_queue_note: New references surfaced while drafting enter here as 'proposed' AND in todo/003 in the same response (standing rule). The /status dashboard reports the backlog by status.

metrics_gate.notes: S1-S6 populated; S5 tribunal-amended 2026-06-26; S6 gains G6 congeniality limit. All pointers resolve. Full gate at compile.
